Example :- In the word “EVERY” the number of
consonants is 3.
Symbol :-
Last letter of the word is ‘H’ use ‘#’
Last letter of the word is ‘K’ use ‘$’
Last letter of the word is ‘T’ use ‘%’
Last letter of the word is ‘M’ use ‘©’
